name: Job Collector - Core (Remotive + Arbeitnow + The Muse + Adzuna + Jooble + RemoteOK + WeWorkRemotely + Himalayas + Jobicy)

nodes.name: Throttle Before Adzuna
nodes.notes: Adzuna default limits: 25 req/min, 250/day. This run only makes one call, but the wait keeps it from firing in the same instant as the other source requests.

nodes.name: Fetch Himalayas Jobs
nodes.notes: Schema inferred, not hand-verified against a live response (site blocks headless fetch). Check the Normalize Himalayas node's output on first real execution and adjust field names if they don't match.

nodes.name: Derive Portal Fields
nodes.notes: Bridges the raw scraper output to what the Bordful portal actually renders: employment type, salary (structured for Adzuna, best-effort regex for the rest), remote_region / workplace_city / workplace_country, and career_level. Without this, every job upserted showed the DB defaults (Full-time, no salary, no location breakdown) regardless of what the source actually provided.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { title: $json.title, company: $json.company, location: $json.location, remote_type: $json.remote_type, apply_url: $json.apply_url, source: $json.source, description: $json.description, posted_at: $json.posted_at, entry_level: $json.entry_level, flagged_suspicious: $json.flagged_suspicious, score: $json.score, type: $json.type, salary_min: $json.salary_min, salary_max: $json.salary_max, salary_currency: $json.salary_currency, salary_unit: $json.salary_unit, workplace_city: $json.workplace_city, workplace_country: $json.workplace_country, remote_region: $json.remote_region, career_level: $json.career_level } }}
